name: Abyss
bio:
Demon Eye Princess of Demon Royalty, who manipulates spatial rifts with Abyssal Gaze. She resists control with great power and becomes a source of strength for the Net of Secrets.

Role: Physical Lifesteal
Intro: A Physical Damage Dealer hero with decent Defense; it restores its own HP while dealing damage.

skillSlots.name: Demon Pupil
skillSlots.description: Attacks single enemy target, dealing 146% P.DMG while ignoring 30% of target's DEF.

skillSlots.name: Ghost Eye Burst
skillSlots.description: Attacks front/mid-row enemy targets, dealing 101% P.DMG and recovering HP equal to 20% of total DMG dealt.
